title: senecio neaei
intro: Senecio neaei, also known as the New Zealand fireweed or parsnip plant, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and other parts of the world. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys, making it a traditional remedy for treating liver and kidney disorders. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Senecio neaei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
